steps.title: Undo the subtraction
steps.content: The equation is $q-34r=s$, and the goal is to isolate $q$. Since $34r$ is being subtracted from $q$, add $34r$ to both sides.

steps.title: Match the isolated form
steps.content: $$q-34r+34r=s+34r$$ $$q=s+34r$$ This matches B. An incorrect response keeps the subtraction instead of undoing it, and the other choices change the equation's structure.
